module.summary: Deterministic composition for uk/universal-credit at 2026-04. Outputs: universal_credit_award_amount, universal_credit_maximum_amount, standard_allowance_amount, amount_included_under_section_10_responsibility_for_children_and_young_persons, amount_included_under_section_11_housing_costs, amount_included_under_section_12_other_particular_needs_or_circumstances, universal_credit_award_deduction_from_maximum_amount, child_element_amount, disabled_child_additional_amount, childcare_costs_element_amount, lcwra_element_amount, carer_element, childcare_costs_element_maximum_amount. Corpus: unversioned corpus.

derived.name: standard_allowance_amount
derived.source: Universal Credit Regulations 2013, regulation 36 table and single-claimant sentence

derived.source: Universal Credit Regulations 2013, regulation 36 table, Child element
